task.title: Range suppression diagnostics not being surfaced
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23235

### Summary

This should generate both a RUF100 and RUF104: https://play.ruff.rs/ca35d323-c80e-4be3-80ed-e02f05fcaab1

### Version

0.15.0

rating.rationale: Agent produced no output whatsoever — no code, no analysis, no communication. The task required diagnosing why RUF100 and RUF104 diagnostics aren't surfaced for range suppressions in ruff, which is a low-complexity issue that should have at minimum yielded a root cause analysis and proposed fix. Complete failure to execute.
